description: Azure Resource Manager read API (management.azure.com) using a bearer access token. Get a token with `az account get-access-token --resource https://management.azure.com` or a service principal. Note: the previous built-in extracted a token from an open Azure Portal tab; this declarative pack uses an explicit ARM token instead. Microsoft Graph and Log Analytics query endpoints (different hosts) are out of scope.

credentialFields.name: armToken
credentialFields.label: ARM access token
credentialFields.description: Bearer token for https://management.azure.com. From `az account get-access-token --resource https://management.azure.com --query accessToken -o tsv`.

tools.name: azure_list_subscriptions
tools.description: List the subscriptions the token can access.

tools.name: azure_list_resource_groups
tools.description: List resource groups in a subscription.

tools.name: azure_list_resources
tools.description: List resources in a subscription. Use $filter to narrow, e.g. "resourceType eq 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'".

tools.name: azure_list_alerts
tools.description: List active alerts across the subscription.

tools.name: azure_list_vms
tools.description: List virtual machines in a subscription.

tools.name: azure_get_activity_log
tools.description: Read management activity-log events for a subscription. Pass an OData $filter on eventTimestamp to bound the window.
